medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Admitted for weakness. Diagnosed with partial obstruction at the end of the stomach. Underwent a procedure to drain fluid from abdomen. Given a blood thinner due to blood clot in leg.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Metastatic Cholangiocarcinoma, failure to thrive, proximal muscle weakness, demyelinating polyneuropathy, ascites, acute DVT, transaminase elevation, hyperbilirubinemia, pancytopenia, asymptomatic bacteriuria.

physical_examination.general_examination: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive. Activity Status: Out of Bed with assistance to chair or wheelchair.

laboratory_examinations.changes_over_time: Decreased RBC from 2.51 to 2.15, Hgb from 8.2 to 7.1, and Hct from 25.8 to 21.8 over time.

laboratory_examinations.findings: Initial PTT values showed variability from 28.3 to 95.5, indicating clotting abnormalities.
laboratory_examinations.changes_over_time: PTT improved from 95.5 to 54.9 over time.

laboratory_examinations.findings: ALT-50, AST-44, AlkPhos-658, TotBili-1.2 at 12:46 AM; ALT increased to 90, AST to 82, AlkPhos to 974, and TotBili to 2.0 by 12:57 PM.
laboratory_examinations.changes_over_time: Significant elevation in liver enzymes and bilirubin over time.

laboratory_examinations.findings: Color-DKAMB, Appearance-HAZY, Blood-LG, Protein-100, Glucose-NEG, Ketone-80, Bilirubin-SM, Urobilin-8, pH-6.0, Leuks-SM.
Peritoneal fluid showed 1+ polymorphonuclear leukocytes; no microorganisms seen. Culture showed no growth.
Final report: Enterobacter cloacae complex, >100,000 CFU/mL, showing susceptibility to several antibiotics.

radiographic_examinations.findings: Deep vein thrombosis involving the left common femoral and other veins.
Mild worsening of hepatic masses and ascites, unchanged appearance of omental caking, and a mass in the porta hepatis with concern for partial gastric outlet obstruction.
radiographic_examinations.changes_over_time: Interval worsening noted in hepatic masses and ascites.

radiographic_examinations.findings: Mild symmetric left ventricular hypertrophy, normal biventricular sizes, hyperdynamic systolic function.

other_tests.findings: Procedure performed to drain abdominal fluid, details of results not specified.

diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was supported by imaging findings of numerous hepatic masses with worsening ascites and a mass concerning for gastric outlet obstruction, along with pathology results indicating the presence of malignant cells consistent with metastatic adenocarcinoma.
